title: State Aid Resolution -- Increase Aid to Municipalities
summary: Councilor Hudson introduces item 10, a resolution co-sponsored with Council President Paniagua requesting increased state aid to municipalities. Council unanimously supportive with brief enthusiastic endorsement. Dr. Chol Majok transitions to items 11-23.
raw_content:
[00:04:32] >> Thank you. I have item number 10 and is
[00:04:35] asking to increase aid to municipalities
[00:04:38] along with President Panti. So if there
[00:04:42] anybody have any questions?
[00:04:44] >> Let's go. Put us on.
[00:04:45] >> Let's go.
[00:04:46] >> Let's get it done.
[00:04:47] >> Let's get it done.
[00:04:48] >> Let's go. Everybody on board.
[00:04:52] >> Yes, please.
[00:04:54] >> And councelor Maj request at the table.
[00:05:02] Run, run, run. [laughter]
[00:05:10] >> Thank you, counselor. Majoke.
[00:05:12] >> Oh, it's me.
[00:05:13] >> Yes, [laughter]
[00:05:18] >> it was that quick, right?
[00:05:20] >> Yeah.
[00:05:21] >> So, [clears throat] thank you, Madam

political_signal.description: Unanimous council support for increased state aid to municipalities

processing_notes: Very brief segment -- council enthusiastically endorses state aid resolution with no substantive discussion needed.
Segment 2 of 23 from Common Council Study Session, Wednesday March 18th 2026
Transcript corrections applied: CNS -> CNS Engineers; SU -> Syracuse University
